findings.evidence: components/radar/market-tape/render.cjs exports renderMarketTapeSection(state) and renderMarketTapeStyle(); the section renderer consumes state.summary and state.signals directly.
outputs/market-tape-state.json is committed and declares render_permission=true.
scripts/homepage-section-registry.cjs maps market-section to outputs/market-tape-state.json and components/radar/market-tape/render.cjs::renderMarketTapeSection/renderMarketTapeStyle.

scripts/inject-market-tape-home-modular.cjs only reads index.html, enforces render_permission, injects style if missing, and replaces the market-section before footer; no additional transformation of Market Tape state is performed.
The registry preview renderer can call the same renderer module directly and write only outputs/homepage-registry-preview.html and outputs/homepage-registry-preview-report.json.

renderMarketTapeSection emits href="outputs/market-tape-state.json". In the preview artifact under /outputs/, this relative href resolves to /outputs/outputs/market-tape-state.json unless normalized later. This does not block server-side rendering but should be normalized before registry preview becomes production-authoritative.

This connector audit inspected committed source and deployed static artifacts. The current tool environment does not provide arbitrary repo command execution, so node scripts/render-homepage-from-registry-preview.cjs was not executed here.

notes_before_authoritative_migration: Run node scripts/render-homepage-from-registry-preview.cjs --strict in the repo runtime.
Normalize preview-relative artifact links emitted by component renderers, or add a preview URL rewrite layer, before relying on the preview as a user-facing artifact.
Keep existing injectors and cleanup scripts authoritative until the full registry preview report returns status OK.

next_target: Priority 3 — remove final legacy assembly dependency only after registry preview strict report is OK
